credentials.title: Blue Economy Foundations — Blue Biotech
credentials.description: Introductory credential covering foundational competences for the Blue Biotech sector of the EU Blue Economy.
credentials.assessment_method: Written test + reflective journal (Portfolio of bioprospecting case study + oral defence)
credentials.learner_profile: Early-career marine biologists, biochemists, and biotech graduates seeking competences in marine bioresource commercialisation.
learning_outcomes: Identify key TMBD axes relevant to Blue Biotech
Apply ocean literacy principles to professional context
Navigate basic blue economy regulatory framework
Use foundational digital tools for sector data management
credentials.stackability_rules: This EQF 4 credential is a prerequisite for 'Blue Economy Professional — Blue Biotech' (EQF 5). Stackable within the Blue Economy Competence Framework.

credentials.title: Blue Economy Professional — Blue Biotech
credentials.description: Professional-level credential developing applied competences for practitioners in the Blue Biotech sector.
credentials.assessment_method: Portfolio of bioprospecting case study + oral defence
credentials.learner_profile: Early-career marine biologists, biochemists, and biotech graduates seeking competences in marine bioresource commercialisation.
learning_outcomes: Apply systems thinking to Blue Biotech challenges
Implement sustainable resource management in sector context
Design participatory stakeholder engagement processes
Analyse TMBD interactions in sector-specific case studies
Deploy digital and data tools for sector monitoring
credentials.stackability_rules: Requires EQF 4 credential 'mc_blue-biotech_eqf4'. Is a prerequisite for 'Blue Economy Expert — Blue Biotech' (EQF 6).

credentials.title: Blue Economy Expert — Blue Biotech
credentials.description: Expert-level credential for senior practitioners leading innovation, governance, and sustainability in Blue Biotech.
credentials.assessment_method: Research project + policy brief + Portfolio of bioprospecting case study + oral defence
credentials.learner_profile: Experienced Blue Biotech professionals (≥3 years) seeking EQF 6 recognition for leadership and strategic roles.
learning_outcomes: Lead strategic planning for Blue Biotech organisations
Integrate blue justice and equity into governance frameworks
Design and evaluate marine spatial plans
Manage cross-sector blue economy partnerships
Apply advanced quantitative and qualitative research methods
Develop and pilot micro-credential learning pathways
credentials.stackability_rules: Requires EQF 5 credential 'mc_blue-biotech_eqf5'. Is a prerequisite for 'Blue Economy Leadership — Blue Biotech' (EQF 7).

credentials.title: Blue Economy Leadership — Blue Biotech
credentials.description: Master-level leadership credential for policy makers, researchers, and senior executives shaping the future of Blue Biotech.
credentials.assessment_method: Thesis (5,000 words) on a cross-sector blue economy challenge + international conference presentation relating to Blue Biotech
credentials.learner_profile: Senior Blue Biotech leaders, researchers, and policy makers with EQF 6 qualification seeking master-level recognition.
learning_outcomes: Synthesise TMBD theory with empirical blue economy evidence
Design transdisciplinary governance frameworks for Blue Biotech
Lead international blue economy negotiations and partnerships
Publish evidence-based blue economy policy recommendations
Mentor the next generation of blue economy professionals
credentials.stackability_rules: Requires EQF 6 credential 'mc_blue-biotech_eqf6'. Top of the Blue Economy Competence Framework stackability ladder.

credentials.title: Blue Economy Foundations — R&I
credentials.description: Introductory credential covering foundational competences for the R&I sector of the EU Blue Economy.
credentials.assessment_method: Written test + reflective journal (Literature review + FAIR data management plan)
credentials.learner_profile: Academic researchers, science-policy liaisons, and innovation officers in blue economy research institutions.
learning_outcomes: Identify key TMBD axes relevant to R&I
Apply ocean literacy principles to professional context
Navigate basic blue economy regulatory framework
Use foundational digital tools for sector data management
credentials.stackability_rules: This EQF 4 credential is a prerequisite for 'Blue Economy Professional — R&I' (EQF 5). Stackable within the Blue Economy Competence Framework.

credentials.title: Blue Economy Professional — R&I
credentials.description: Professional-level credential developing applied competences for practitioners in the R&I sector.
credentials.assessment_method: Literature review + FAIR data management plan
credentials.learner_profile: Academic researchers, science-policy liaisons, and innovation officers in blue economy research institutions.
learning_outcomes: Apply systems thinking to R&I challenges
Implement sustainable resource management in sector context
Design participatory stakeholder engagement processes
Analyse TMBD interactions in sector-specific case studies
Deploy digital and data tools for sector monitoring
credentials.stackability_rules: Requires EQF 4 credential 'mc_research-innovation_eqf4'. Is a prerequisite for 'Blue Economy Expert — R&I' (EQF 6).

credentials.title: Blue Economy Expert — R&I
credentials.description: Expert-level credential for senior practitioners leading innovation, governance, and sustainability in R&I.
credentials.assessment_method: Research project + policy brief + Literature review + FAIR data management plan
credentials.learner_profile: Experienced R&I professionals (≥3 years) seeking EQF 6 recognition for leadership and strategic roles.
learning_outcomes: Lead strategic planning for R&I organisations
Integrate blue justice and equity into governance frameworks
Design and evaluate marine spatial plans
Manage cross-sector blue economy partnerships
Apply advanced quantitative and qualitative research methods
Develop and pilot micro-credential learning pathways
credentials.stackability_rules: Requires EQF 5 credential 'mc_research-innovation_eqf5'. Is a prerequisite for 'Blue Economy Leadership — R&I' (EQF 7).

credentials.title: Blue Economy Leadership — R&I
credentials.description: Master-level leadership credential for policy makers, researchers, and senior executives shaping the future of R&I.
credentials.assessment_method: Thesis (5,000 words) on a cross-sector blue economy challenge + international conference presentation relating to R&I
credentials.learner_profile: Senior R&I leaders, researchers, and policy makers with EQF 6 qualification seeking master-level recognition.
learning_outcomes: Synthesise TMBD theory with empirical blue economy evidence
Design transdisciplinary governance frameworks for R&I
Lead international blue economy negotiations and partnerships
Publish evidence-based blue economy policy recommendations
Mentor the next generation of blue economy professionals
credentials.stackability_rules: Requires EQF 6 credential 'mc_research-innovation_eqf6'. Top of the Blue Economy Competence Framework stackability ladder.

credentials.title: Blue Economy Foundations — Ship Repair
credentials.description: Introductory credential covering foundational competences for the Ship Repair sector of the EU Blue Economy.
credentials.assessment_method: Written test + reflective journal (Green retrofit specification + lifecycle cost analysis)
credentials.learner_profile: Naval architects, shipyard engineers, and sustainable-ship-design specialists focused on green retrofitting.
learning_outcomes: Identify key TMBD axes relevant to Ship Repair
Apply ocean literacy principles to professional context
Navigate basic blue economy regulatory framework
Use foundational digital tools for sector data management
credentials.stackability_rules: This EQF 4 credential is a prerequisite for 'Blue Economy Professional — Ship Repair' (EQF 5). Stackable within the Blue Economy Competence Framework.

credentials.stackability_rules: Requires EQF 4 credential 'mc_ship-repair_eqf4'. Is a prerequisite for 'Blue Economy Expert — Ship Repair' (EQF 6).
